title: Online STEM Facilitator
details: At STEM Montessori, I developed and taught six coding courses covering Python and HTML/CSS for students aged 10-18. I facilitated beginner to advanced levels, delivered engaging 1-hour lectures, and fostered active learning and interpersonal connections among 100 students.

title: Student Software Developer
details: As a Student Developer at Knead Technologies, I designed an intuitive dashboard and developed features using ReactJS, PHP (Laravel), Apache, and MySQL, all within a Docker environment. I collaborated with a team of six in Agile Sprints, conducted E2E testing with Cypress, and unit testing with PHPUnit. Additionally, I created comprehensive documentation for the codebase and user resources.

title: Full Stack Developer
details: As a Full Stack Developer at ScaleupMap, I transform designs into fully functional code across both frontend and backend. I develop the frontend using React and Next.js, while handling backend development with Go and Python, and managing data with PostgreSQL. I collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of features.
